creator: freebsdbugzilla@agneau.org
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #11)

I understand the theoretical scheduling but the last build for 133arm64 quarterly is 16 Jul 2024 and there is still no pkg for bind918-9.18.28 .
The last arm64 build is 29 Jul 2024 for quarterly 140releng-armv7
There don't seems to be any amr64 build running since

If you compare with amd64 the is much more frequent build for amd64 and a new one is started almost each time it is needed which make them smaller and faster.

The more idle time between arm64 build make the build bigger and longer.
